# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance

## Verification

<!-- List commands run, manual checks performed, or explain why verification is not applicable. -->

## Documentation

- [ ] Public docs or READMEs were updated.
- [ ] No public docs change is needed because the behaviour is unchanged or already documented.

## Safety

- [ ] I did not include API keys, passwords, tokens, webhook secrets, customer data, or private account details.
- [ ] I checked public copy for private implementation details.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes follow the repository security policy.
